signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Our personal loan borrowers have a weighted average income of $157,000 and a weighted average FICO score of 745... net charge-off rates improve, even as there has been moderate signs of stress showing up for some other companies.
signal_evidence.credit_quality_trend: For personal loans, the annualized charge-off rate declined by more than 20 basis points to 2.6% from 2.83% in the prior quarter.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: I would like to invest a lot more than we're investing... we've hired a lot more people in 2025 than we set out at the beginning of the year... we are stepping on the gas to accelerate the investment in our existing businesses.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: In down-rate environments, we've been able to maintain solid pricing above where rates have gone... NIM was 5.84% for the quarter, down 2 basis points sequentially.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: I've never been more optimistic about our prospects than I am today... I'm more confident than ever that our strategy and our execution will continue to deliver our sustainable competitive advantage.
